image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about transfer of learning than social media does.
Context visual: Transfer of learning means applying knowledge from one context to another.
Escalation visual: But did you know its effectiveness varies greatly?
Evidence visual: Studies show it’s more effective when the similarities between contexts are clear.
Payoff visual: So, understanding how we learn can unlock our potential.
Cta visual: Want more insights on learning? Hit follow and explore the science!
